intervention: single 25 mg oral synthetic psilocybin with psychological support
sae_window: post-dose through day 43; therefore zero within day 7
severe_ae_label: participants with at least one severe related adverse event
severe_psych_label: participant with severe panic attack and paranoia
notes: No post-dose serious TEAEs; severe psychiatric-event window exceeds the estimand by 2 days. Safety population differs slightly from randomized population.

intervention: single 25 mg oral psilocybin with preparation, 7-hour monitoring, and integration
sae_window: complete 365-day follow-up; therefore zero within day 7
severe_ae_label: severe adverse-event count on dosing day; table reports events, not clearly unique participants
severe_psych_label: participants with persistent severe anxiety requiring medical attention
notes: Participant-level count is available for persistent severe anxiety, but exact onset and 0-7-day status are not reported. Total/related severe-AE table uses event counts rather than participant counts.

intervention: single 25 mg COMP360 with psychological support
sae_outcome_label: serious adverse events in 25 mg group: suicidal ideation (2) and intentional nonsuicidal self-injury (1)
sae_window: 12 weeks; exact early window not extracted in this pilot
severe_ae_label: participants with any severe adverse event
severe_psych_label: serious suicidal ideation or intentional self-injury events
notes: Population is TRD and comparator is psychoactive minimal dose. Retain outside direct synthesis; counts require duplicate verification against supplement/registry before final review.

intervention: 25 mg psilocybin with adjunct psychotherapy; some participants received a second dose after week 6
sae_outcome_label: serious adverse reactions after 25 mg administrations
sae_window: 12 weeks; first-dose phase is not fully separable for all safety tables
severe_ae_label: administrations/cases with severe adverse events on day 0
severe_psych_label: suicidal ideation reported on dosing day
notes: Administration-level denominators are not interchangeable with participant risk. Two serious adverse reactions occurred after 25 mg, including one HPPD case. Do not pool with direct MDD evidence.
